stemHtml: Electrically powered ice protection devices on aircraft are used as…

options.a: anti-icing devices for pitot-tubes, static ports and windshields.
options.b: de-icing devices for pitot-tubes, static ports and windshields.
options.c: de-icing devices for wings, wheel bays and aerials.
options.d: anti-icing devices for wings, wheel bays and aerials.
